summary: Iteration 35 — Regulation 44 operational intelligence: 8/8 backend tests pass, frontend tab strip + 40-module/8-category view + manual notes + visit summary + RBAC + mobile all verified working.

issues: When staff hits /ofsted the command-centre loader stays visible behind a 'Couldn't load command centre' toast. App does not crash but the in-page state is stuck on 'Loading inspection command centre…' instead of a clean 'You don't have access' empty state. Minor UX polish only.

action_items: (Optional/UX) On /ofsted for staff role, render an explicit 403 empty state instead of leaving the loading skeleton on screen behind a toast.
critical_code_review_comments: Regulation44View.jsx — fine, single-file ~575 lines, components are well decomposed (ModuleCard / CategoryAccordion / ManualNoteEditor / VisitSummaryPanel).

regulation_44_modules.py is large (~900 lines) but logically one registry+aggregator; acceptable. Each live module path has its own try/except in build_regulation_44 so a single module failure won't break the payload.

All data-testids are present (reg44-view, reg44-cat-*, reg44-cat-toggle-*, reg44-module-*, reg44-module-toggle-*, reg44-module-body-*, reg44-open-*, reg44-search, reg44-filter-{all,red,amber,green}, reg44-visit-summary/edit/save, reg44-{strengths,recommendations,visitor-name,judgement,visit-date}, note-add-*, note-editor-*, note-save-*, ofsted-tab-command, ofsted-tab-regulation_44).
Manual note flow correctly flips module RAG to green after a note is saved (verified both via backend test and via UI reload after save).
Children-only scope verified: 'Tom Whitfield' and 'Margaret Lewis' not present anywhere in rendered Regulation 44 UI for the manager session.
test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123, senior@care.local / Senior@123, staff@care.local / Staff@123
seed_data_creation: Created during test: manual evidence note on online_safety + equality_diversity, and a Reg 44 visit summary by 'Sarah Independent' on 2026-02-10 (good judgement). Cleaned up only the visit inside test_reg44_visits_crud; manual notes persist (test reuses upsert).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 Regulation 44 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration35.py pass. To run pytest you MUST export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL before pytest (the test reads it via os.environ.get — there is no default fallback). Frontend flow tested: /ofsted manager → ofsted-tab-regulation_44 → reg44-view → all 8 reg44-cat-* present → all 7 safeguarding modules + missing_from_care body + reg44-open-missing_from_care link OK → manual note add/save on online_safety works (toast + RAG flips green after reload) → search('medication') correctly hides other categories → RAG filter chips work → reg44-visit-edit form (visitor name + strengths + recommendations) saves and resurfaces → tab switch back-and-forth preserves Regulation 44 view → senior role: tab visible but note-add-* and reg44-visit-edit hidden (correct RBAC) → staff role: /ofsted returns 403 gracefully (toast only, no crash) → mobile 390x844: reg44-view renders, content stacks. Sidebar shows 7 items including Adult Services which differs from the docstring in /app/memory/test_credentials.md that mentions 6 — flag if main agent intended 6.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing functionality. Only a minor UX nit on staff /ofsted (stuck loader behind toast).
